name: PT M Cash Integrasi Tbk
summary: PT M Cash Integrasi Tbk operates as a digital distribution company in Indonesia. It provides digital kiosk, a self-service kiosk in modern and traditional retails; cashier, which offers digital products at modern retail; and digital products to traditional retails, as well as apps/chat bots. The company also offers information technology management consulting services. PT M Cash Integrasi Tbk was founded in 2010 and is based in South Jakarta, Indonesia.
